caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly personal studio space, as evidenced by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and green pants. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, suggesting he might be interacting with someone off-camera or responding to questions. The environment is well-lit, and the overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional discussion.
